name: Yue Kan Holdings Limited
summary: Yue Kan Holdings Ltd. operates as a marine construction works subcontractor in Hong Kong. Its marine construction works include reclamation works; regulation and deposition of sand blanket works; submarine pipeline works; and sediment treatment works. The company also provides vessel chartering services; and other civil engineering works comprising foundation works, site formation works, and roads and drainage works. It serves main contractors engaged by property developers or project employers in the public and private sectors. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Jordan, Hong Kong.
